name: Path of Swords
description: The warrior's path. Choosing it sets Swords as your highest attribute.

name: Path of Pentacles
description: The rogue's path. Choosing it sets Pentacles as your highest attribute.

name: Path of Cups
description: The scholar's path. Choosing it sets Cups as your highest attribute.

name: Path of Wands
description: The sorcerer's path. Choosing it sets Wands as your highest attribute.
